productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men Polo Yellow Tshirt
description: Composition Yellow polo t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with adidas patented Triple-Stripes in contrast colour, buttoned placket, embroidered branding on left chest and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash No bleaching, dry cleaning or ironing Combining sport and style is adidas' forte. This t-shirt beats the monsoon rain with an individualistic look. Wear this to any off-duty event to look your best. Pair this with dark denims and sports shoes to snazz up your style. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
